task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenMRS using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenMRS home screen, admin dashboard, or a logged-in user indicator showing 'superman' in the top navigation bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the concept editing page for 'Weight (kg)' (ID: 5089).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'View Concept' or 'Edit Concept' page in OpenMRS. The page title, header, or concept details should explicitly indicate 'Weight (kg)' or Concept ID '5089'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct low validation limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the numeric validation section of the concept edit form. The 'Absolute Low' input field must contain '0.1' and the 'Critical Low' input field must contain '2.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct high validation limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the numeric validation section of the concept edit form. The 'Critical High' input field must contain '150.0' and the 'Absolute High' input field must contain '350.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated concept.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success banner/notification (e.g., 'Concept saved successfully') OR the read-only view of the concept dictionary page displaying the newly applied numeric limits.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMRS web interface to update the concept.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the OpenMRS GUI, not terminal curl commands, API testing tools, or database SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar should show the local OpenMRS/Bahmni instance address, and the interface must match standard OpenMRS styling.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The limits must be entered into the actual HTML input fields of the OpenMRS concept form, not a notepad, text file, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verified UUID for the 'Weight (kg)' concept (ID: 5089) is '5089AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA'. The agent should be editing this specific concept. The target limits to verify in the GUI are Absolute Low: 0.1, Critical Low: 2.0, Critical High: 150.0, and Absolute High: 350.0.
